reasoning: 1. TP Dist: 2756.6. 2. SL Dist: 1243.4. 3. TP/SL Ratio: 2.21. 4. Floor Check: Price is above POC (68775.06). Technical Justification: I am NOT shorting because the price has reclaimed and is holding above the high-volume POC, which acts as a structural floor. While the Red Team warns of a 'volume-less grind', the 15m chart shows a clear consolidation pattern above the POC with higher lows, suggesting absorption of supply. A move toward the 72.5k resistance is the path of least resistance as long as the POC holds. Shorting above a major volume node is counter-trend to the immediate recovery momentum.
reasoning_zh: 1. 止盈距离: 2756.6。2. 止损距离: 1243.4。3. 盈亏比: 2.21。4. 支撑检查: 价格位于 POC (68775.06) 之上。技术理由：我不选择做空是因为价格已收复并企稳在成交量控制点 (POC) 之上，该位置目前充当结构性底部。虽然红队警告存在“无量上涨”的风险，但 15 分钟图表显示在 POC 上方有明显的盘整形态且低点抬高，表明供应正在被吸收。只要 POC 支撑有效，向 72.5k 阻力位移动是阻力最小的路径。在主要成交量节点上方做空违背了当前的短期反弹动能。
